sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ هَدَى أَنْ تُصَوِّرَ الشُّرُوقَ مِنَ النَّافِذَةِ.
sentences.translation: Huda je htjela fotografisati izlazak sunca kroz prozor.
sentences.translationEn: Huda wanted to photograph the sunrise through the window.

sentences.translation: Probudila se rano i uzela telefon.
sentences.translationEn: She woke up early and held her phone.

sentences.translation: Čekala je sunce i pažljivo namjestila kameru.
sentences.translationEn: She waited for the sun and carefully adjusted the camera.

sentences.translation: Snimila je fotografiju i bila je veoma predivna.
sentences.translationEn: She took the photo and it was very wonderful.
